$comment: Neutral shipped <stddef.h> (C89 7.17) — the common typedefs + NULL, as language-NEUTRAL data injected by the semantic phase (see README + limits.json). `size_t`/`ptrdiff_t` are pointer-width = 8 bytes on EVERY current DSS target (all 64-bit; LP64 + LLP64 agree on pointer width) -> u64/i64; an ILP32 target would make them 4-byte (deferred D-FFI-STDINT-PTR-WIDTH-ILP32, shared with stdint). `wchar_t` is PER-FORMAT (c106, D-FFI-STDDEF-WCHAR-PE-WIDTH closed): elf/macho i32 (the POSIX width, UNCHANGED) and pe u16 (the Windows UTF-16 code unit) via typedef variants. The pe axis ALSO rides pe-gated duplicate typedefs in stdio/stdlib/io.json (the MSVC corecrt model: every CRT header defines wchar_t; duplication is the size_t 5-descriptor precedent). `NULL` is the integer null-pointer constant 0 (C 6.3.2.3 — the constant 0 in pointer context is the null pointer); the `constants` surface is integer-typed, so it rides as i64 0 and converts to any pointer like a literal 0. `offsetof` is a function-like macro (no descriptor surface for it yet — deferred D-FFI-OFFSETOF-MACRO). * D-LANG-TYPE-IDENTITY-VOCABULARY: the 64-bit aliases are no longer a bare `u64`/`i64`. C defines each as an ALIAS of a standard NAMED type, and WHICH name is DATA-MODEL-dependent - `uint64_t`/`uintptr_t`/`uintmax_t`/`size_t` ARE `unsigned long` on LP64 and `unsigned long long` on LLP64 (glibc vs mingw/MSVC spell them exactly so); `int64_t`/`intmax_t`/`ptrdiff_t` likewise `long` / `long long`. A bare core mints the ANONYMOUS representative, which since type identity was split off representation is a THIRD type matching NEITHER named entry: `stdc_count_ones((uint64_t)x)` fell out of <stdbit.h>'s 5-way `_Generic`, and `unsigned long long *p = &u64var;` became a bare S_TypeMismatch. Each therefore carries the `when:{dataModel}` variant selector (the THIRD target axis, alongside arch/format) plus the hir-text vocabulary tag - the SAME 8-byte core on both models, a different IDENTITY. No ILP32 arm is declared: an ILP32 target needs 4-byte intptr/ptrdiff/size widths anyway (D-FFI-STDINT-PTR-WIDTH-ILP32, still open), so 0 variants match there and a reference fails LOUD as an undefined type rather than silently binding a wrong width.
